issues.message: Rooted href does not resolve within build output

observations: The meta banner is present at the top but renders in very small text at screenshot resolution, making it easy to miss the critical demo-context message before the hero.
Typography is generally editorial and serif-forward as specified, though body text density in the Author's Notes section is quite tight and may feel cramped on real viewport widths.

The five-level hierarchy section and 'Spec Your Idea' wizard are both visible and structurally intact, but interactive affordances (clickable levels, wizard steps) are not apparent from the static screenshot alone.
The before/after comparison panel is present with real content in both columns, satisfying the spec requirement for non-placeholder copy.
Overall the page avoids the anti-patterns (no gradient blobs, no stat counters, no dark default background), and the light-mode editorial aesthetic is intact.
